LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT JUCICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA'S NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, THE DEMURRER IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 19, 2013, TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE BUSCH IN THIS DEPARTMENT. JUDGE MILLER RECUSES HERSELF. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL HAS A MINISTERIAL DUTY TO REQUIRE DEFENDANT VLSP TO REPRESENT PLAINTIFF OR TO ESTABLISH OR FUND ANY PARTICULAR LEGAL SERVICES PROGRAM. INDEED, THE APPLICABLE LAW MAKES CLEAR THAT ANY SUCH ACTS ARE DISCRETIONARY AND NOT SUBJECT TO MANDAMUS RELIEF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT VOLUNTEER LEGAL SERVICES PROGRAM'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE OR PROHIBITION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT VLSP'S LEGAL SERVICES ARE A MANDATORY OR MINISTERIAL ACT. THE SARGENT SHRIVER CIVIL COUNSEL ACT, GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68650-51, DOES NOT GUARANTEE LEGAL REPRESENTATION FOR CIVIL HARASSMENT CASES IN GENERAL, LET ALONE ANY PARTICULAR CASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
Respondent Jucicial Council Of California'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Respondent Judicial Council Of California's Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has failed to state facts sufficient to show that Defendant Judicial Council has a ministerial duty to require Defendant VLSP to represent Plaintiff or to establish or fund any particular legal services program. Indeed, the applicable law makes clear that any such acts are discretionary and not subject to mandamus relief. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Respondent Volunteer Legal Services Program'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate Or Prohibition
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ALLEN KUO, ESQ., 415.788.1900, FOR RESPONDENT VOLUNTEER LEGAL SERVICES PROGRAM OF SAN FRANCISCO BAR; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Respondent Volunteer Legal Services Program's Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate Or Prohibition is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has failed to state facts sufficient to show that Defendant VLSP's legal services are a mandatory or ministerial act. The Sargent Shriver Civil Counsel Act, Government Code Section 68650-51, does not guarantee legal representation for civil harassment cases in general, let alone any particular case. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: RESPONDENT JUCICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA'S Ntc Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate. Per order of the presiding judge, the demurrer is continued to February 19, 2013, to be heard by Judge Busch in this department. Judge Miller recuses herself. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate Or Prohibition
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: RESPONDENT VOLUNTEER LEGAL SERVICES PROGRAM'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate Or Prohibition. Per order of the presiding judge, the motion is continued to February 19, 2013, to be heard by Judge Busch in this department. Judge Miller recuses herself. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CCH-12-573750 WITH CASE CPF-12-512628
Off Calendar Dec-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - KARL NICHOLAS, PETITIONER APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KARL NICHOLAS'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CCH-12-573750 WITH CASE CPF-12-512628 is Denied without prejudice. Respondents have not been served with the summons and complaint and have not appeared in this action. Additionally, Petitioner has not shown that consolidation is necessary or proper. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)
